title: Delicate Turkish Fold Omelette with Mushroom
description: A simple yet elegant omelette dish inspired by Turkish cuisine, filled with sautéed mushrooms and a delicate texture.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Heat the butter in a small non-stick pan over medium heat.
Once the butter has melted, pour in the eggs.
Let the eggs cook for about 30 seconds, until the edges start to set.
Add the sliced mushrooms to one half of the omelette and sprinkle with ovoli.
Use a spatula to gently fold the other half of the omelette over the filling.
Cook for another 30 seconds, until the cheese is melted and the eggs are cooked through.
Slide the omelette out of the pan onto a plate and serve hot.
